edit_product.name: Name

edit_product.track_stock_helper_tracked: Product — every sale/purchase updates the stock balance.

edit_product.track_stock_helper_disabling: Switching from product to service. The current balance will be cleared.

expense_form.no_employees: No active employees. Add one in Settings first.
expense_form.category_helper: Optional. Reports break down by category

purchase_form.new_product_hint: The new product will be added to the catalog automatically
purchase_form.on_credit_helper: Account is optional for credit purchases

credit_sale_form.intro: Full credit sale. When the customer pays, record it via "Add payment".
credit_sale_form.account_helper: The transaction currency is taken from this account
credit_sale_form.customer_helper: Customer is required for credit sales

sale_form.no_products: No products yet. Add a product first.
sale_form.account_helper_credit: No money received — used only for the transaction currency
sale_form.contact_helper_credit: Customer is required for credit sales
sale_form.contact_helper_normal: Optional. Sales without a customer are accepted too
sale_form.on_credit_description: No payment is recorded now. The customer can pay later.
sale_form.stock_warning_body: Stock currently has {available} pcs, but you're selling {requested}. On confirm, the system will auto-create a purchase for the missing {missing} pcs (no supplier, unpaid) — fill it in later.
sale_form.stock_warning_zero: No {product} in stock. On confirm, the system will auto-create a purchase for {requested} pcs — add the supplier and payment afterwards.
sale_form.auto_backfill_notice: Stock was short, so {count} auto-purchase(s) were created:
sale_form.auto_backfill_hint: Open the auto-created purchases and fill in the supplier, cost and payment.
sale_form.auto_backfill_banner: This record was auto-created by the system because stock was short at the time of sale. Please fill in the supplier, cost and payment.

void_confirm.tx_warning: All linked payments will be cancelled. Account balance and stock movements will be reversed.
void_confirm.cf_warning: Only this payment is cancelled. The transaction stays open and its payment status is recomputed.

add_cash_flow.not_supported: This transaction type can't take additional payments.
add_cash_flow.allow_overpayment_description: The amount exceeds the remaining balance. Confirming will mark it as "overpaid".

errors.fallback: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
errors.no_network: 🌐 Can't reach the server. Check your connection.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Session ended. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.NO_PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION: 🏢 Pick an organisation or create a new one.
errors.ACCOUNT_BALANCE_NOT_ZERO: Account has a balance — zero it before archiving.
errors.SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED: A subscription is required. Update your plan in the app.

api_error.MISSING_PERMISSION: You don't have permission for this action
api_error.NOT_ORGANIZATION_MEMBER: You're not a member of this organisation
api_error.ACCOUNT_NAME_EXISTS: An account with this name already exists
api_error.ACCOUNT_BALANCE_NOT_ZERO: Account balance is not zero. Archive instead of deleting
api_error.ACCOUNT_HAS_CASH_FLOWS: Account has active cash flows. Cannot be deleted
api_error.ACCOUNT_OPENING_BALANCE_NOT_SUPPORTED: At this stage opening balance can only be 0
api_error.CATEGORY_IN_USE: This category is in use by transactions or products. Cannot be deleted
api_error.CATEGORY_TYPE_MISMATCH: Category type doesn't match the system category
api_error.CATEGORY_DUPLICATE_SYSTEM_LINK: This system category is already linked
api_error.CATEGORY_ARCHIVED: Category is archived. Restore it first
api_error.CATEGORY_RESTORE_CONFLICT: An active category with this name already exists. Rename it first
api_error.SYSTEM_CATEGORY_CODE_EXISTS: A system category with this code already exists
api_error.CONTACT_PHONE_EXISTS: A contact with this phone already exists
api_error.CONTACT_IN_USE: Contact is in use by active transactions. Archive instead of deleting
api_error.PRODUCT_IN_USE: Product is in use by transactions. Archive instead of deleting
api_error.PRODUCT_NAME_EXISTS: A product with this name already exists
api_error.PRODUCT_CATEGORY_TYPE_MISMATCH: Selected category is not for products
api_error.STOCK_NOT_TRACKED: Stock tracking is not enabled for this product
api_error.STOCK_TRACKING_TOGGLE_FORBIDDEN: Stock tracking cannot be toggled. Re-create the product
api_error.NEGATIVE_STOCK: This stock level is not allowed (would become negative)
api_error.OVERPAYMENT_REJECTED: Amount exceeds remaining balance. Confirm with the "Accept overpayment" button
api_error.CURRENCY_MISMATCH: Account currency doesn't match transaction currency
api_error.TRANSFER_INVALID_LEGS: A transfer requires exactly 1 outflow and 1 inflow
api_error.TRANSACTION_VOIDED: A voided transaction cannot be modified
api_error.CASH_FLOW_DIRECTION_MISMATCH: Payment direction doesn't match transaction type
api_error.DUPLICATE_DETECTED: This transaction looks like a recent duplicate. Opened the existing one
api_error.OPENING_BALANCE_HAS_CASH_FLOWS: Cannot add payments to an opening balance
api_error.DEBT_CREATE_REQUIRES_CASH_FLOW: Creating a debt transaction requires 1 payment
api_error.IMMUTABLE_FIELD: This field cannot be changed. Void the record and re-enter
api_error.CASH_FLOW_VOID_FORBIDDEN: This payment cannot be voided separately
api_error.FEATURE_DISABLED: This feature is not enabled on your plan. Contact your administrator to upgrade
api_error.FEATURE_LIMIT_REACHED: Plan limit reached. Upgrade the plan to add more
api_error.SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED: An active subscription is required for this action
api_error.DEFAULT_PLAN_NOT_CONFIGURED: Default plan is not configured. Please contact your administrator
api_error.MEMBER_CANNOT_REMOVE_OWNER: The organization owner cannot be removed
api_error.MEMBER_PHONE_BELONGS_TO_EXISTING_MEMBER: This phone number is already linked to another member in the organization
api_error.GOOGLE_SHEETS_NOT_CONFIGURED: Google Sheets integration is not configured on this deployment. Contact your administrator
api_error.GOOGLE_SHEETS_OAUTH_STATE_INVALID: Connection session is invalid. Please try again
api_error.GOOGLE_SHEETS_INTEGRATION_NOT_FOUND: Google Sheets is not connected. Connect a Google account first
api_error.GOOGLE_SHEETS_INTEGRATION_REVOKED: Google access has been revoked. Please reconnect
api_error.GOOGLE_SHEETS_SPREADSHEET_NOT_FOUND: Spreadsheet not found. It may have been deleted
api_error.GOOGLE_SHEETS_TAB_NOT_FOUND: Tab "{tabName}" not found. Check that it still exists in the spreadsheet
api_error.GOOGLE_SHEETS_MAPPING_NOT_FOUND: No mapping configured for this transaction type
api_error.GOOGLE_SHEETS_TEST_PUSH_NO_DATA: No transaction available for test push — create at least one first

EMPLOYEES_LIMIT.name: Number of employees
EMPLOYEES_LIMIT.description: Total number of employees in the organisation (including the owner). The limit is checked when inviting a new employee.

ACCOUNT_LIMIT.name: Number of accounts (cash registers)
ACCOUNT_LIMIT.description: Number of cash registers, bank accounts and e-wallets in one organisation.

ORGANIZATION_LIMIT.name: Number of organisations
ORGANIZATION_LIMIT.description: Number of organisations a single user can create (owned by them).

ADVANCED_REPORTS.name: Advanced reports
ADVANCED_REPORTS.description: Profit & loss (P&L) and financial position (balance sheet) reports. Cash flow report is available on all plans.

MULTI_CURRENCY_SUPPORT.name: Multi-currency support
MULTI_CURRENCY_SUPPORT.description: Run accounts and transactions in currencies other than the organisation's base currency.

DEBT_TRACKING.name: Debt reports
DEBT_TRACKING.description: Customer and supplier debt reports and per-contact balances. Creating debt transactions is available on all plans.

ADVANCED_TRANSACTIONS.name: Advanced transactions
ADVANCED_TRANSACTIONS.description: Manual balance adjustments (inventory variance, shrinkage) and cross-currency transfers.

SCHEDULED_TRANSACTIONS.name: Scheduled payments
SCHEDULED_TRANSACTIONS.description: Recurring monthly/weekly transactions and automatic reminders via Telegram.

INVENTORY_MANAGEMENT.name: Inventory management
INVENTORY_MANAGEMENT.description: Track product stock levels, warehouse movements and inventory adjustments.

ADVANCED_RBAC.name: Custom roles
ADVANCED_RBAC.description: Create your own roles in the organisation and assign sets of permissions to them.

SALES_COMMISSION.name: Sales commissions
SALES_COMMISSION.description: Calculate, report and void commissions for sales employees.

organizations.manage.title: Manage organisation
organizations.manage.description: Change organisation name, plan, language and base currency

members.manage.title: Manage employees
members.manage.description: Invite, suspend, archive employees and assign their roles

roles.manage.title: Manage roles
roles.manage.description: Create, edit and delete custom roles

transactions.create.title: Create transactions
transactions.create.description: Record sales, expenses, transfers and other transactions

transactions.update.title: Edit transactions
transactions.update.description: Change fields on existing transactions and confirm AI suggestions

cash_flows.create.title: Add payments
cash_flows.create.description: Record income or expense payments against a transaction

reports.read.title: View reports
reports.read.description: Financial reports: cash flow, profit/loss, financial position

commissions.manage.title: Manage commissions
commissions.manage.description: Record and void commissions on sales

ai.manage.title: AI features
ai.manage.description: Input data via AI and review AI suggestions
